function getVerificationResult(string calldata assetId, string calldata originChain) external view returns (uint8 score, bytes32 assetHash, uint256 verifiedSupply, uint8 anomalyType)
event VerificationResultUpdated(string indexed assetId, string originChain, uint8 score)
event AnomalyDetected(string indexed assetId, string originChain, uint8 anomalyType, uint256 severity)
